build_system: npm with tsc for compilation, CDK CLI for synthesis
test_framework: Jest with ts-jest transform, aws-cdk-lib/assertions (Template.fromStack, Match helpers). jest-autoclean setupFile. Snapshot tests in test/__snapshots__/
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx jest --no-coverage (all tests pass). 2. Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx cdk synth (succeeds without errors). 3. Verify snapshot is updated with NODE_OPTIONS='' npx jest --no-coverage -u if needed.
snapshot_or_generated_files: test/__snapshots__/cdk-base.test.ts.snap - auto-generated by Jest snapshot test. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS='' npx jest --no-coverage -u' to update after changes.
setup_instructions: Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npm ci to install dependencies.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - npm registry accessible. Must use NODE_OPTIONS='' prefix for all node/npm commands due to sandbox preload issue. Node v22 available.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement. Conventional commits. L2/L3 constructs preferred. Least-privilege IAM. Update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Branch naming: feat/ prefix.
key_patterns: Stack defined in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts as CdkBaseStack class. Tests use Template.fromStack() with Match helpers. State machine uses chained .next() pattern with sfn.DefinitionBody.fromChainable(). DynamoDB tasks use tasks.DynamoPutItem/DynamoUpdateItem. Error handling via .addCatch(). SNS notifications via tasks.SnsPublish. Permissions via .grant() and explicit IAM policy statements.
directory_structure: bin/ - CDK app entry point. lib/ - CDK stack definitions. test/ - Jest tests with __snapshots__/. .github/workflows/ - CI pipeline (npm test + cdk synth).
